sources.title: Kildall-style data-flow framework
implementation_notes: Use monotone dataflow only for bounded local summaries in v0.1.
Represent unresolved joins as UNKNOWN instead of inventing precise facts.

sources.title: A simple, fast dominance algorithm
implementation_notes: Use dominance and post-dominance as CFG view features, not as complete semantic proof.
Keep algorithm implementation deterministic and fixture-covered.
